overview: GIET Engineering College, established in 2009, is a prominent private engineering institution located in Chaitanya Nagar, Rajahmundry (Rajamahendravaram). It is part of the GIET Group of Institutions and is strategically situated on NH-16. The college is recognized for its industry-aligned training programs, including being the first in the region to host an Apple Centre of Excellence. It offers a technology-driven environment with a focus on practical expertise through various national and international corporate collaborations.
accreditation: Approved by AICTE, New Delhi. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A+' Grade. Permanently affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK). ISO certified and several programs are NBA accredited.

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, ECE, EEE, ME, Civil, Mining, Automobile)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 50% aggregate in PCM + AP EAPCET / JEE Main rank
Graduation with 50% aggregate + AP ICET rank + GD/PI
Graduation with 50% and Mathematics at 10+2 level + AP ICET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, Structural Engg, CAD/CAM, Power Systems, VLSI)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech with 50% aggregate + GATE score / AP PGECET

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions are primarily through AP EAPCET counseling (Convener Quota) and JEE Main (Management Quota). MBA and MCA admissions are via AP ICET. M.Tech candidates are selected based on GATE or AP PGECET scores followed by GD/PI. Counseling Code: GIET.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–20, 2026; Results: June 1, 2026; B.Tech Counseling: Expected July 2026; AP ICET 2026: May 2026.

campus.area: Lush green campus integrated within the larger GIET campus
facilities: Apple Centre of Excellence (First in the region)
Red Hat Academy for RHCP training
Central Library with extensive Digital Resources
Separate Boarding Hostels for Boys and Girls with 24/7 surveillance
Transport (Extensive fleet covering Rajahmundry and surrounding areas)
campus.specialNote: The college is distinguished by its 'Centre for Excellence' initiatives and collaborative training with global giants like Apple and Red Hat. It provides specialized 'Pre-Placement Training' programs including GRE and EFL training for students aspiring for global careers.

contact.address: Chaitanya Nagar, Rajamahendravaram, East Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh - 533296
